particulars.description: 1. the leasehold property known as shop 1, crown corner high street, crowthorne,. EG45 7AD as shown edged red on the lease plan annexed to this deed, which is to be granted. Out of freehold title BK115086. Title number: tbc. A new title number will be generated upon. Successful registration of the lease at hm land registry.
